rationale.fidelity: Correctly separates assortment membership from uncertain starting states and realized Markov paths while preserving category capacity and expected revenue.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explains capacity use and the behavioral mechanism well, though the managerial stakes and explicit counterfactual are somewhat compressed.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is requested or introduced.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Calls substitution a model assumption and rules out decision-time access to future customer states and paths.
rationale.overall: Excellent mechanism-faithful explanation with a minor deduction for abbreviated stakes/counterfactual framing.
